title: Badge Component
content:
## Badge Component The `Badge` component is a reusable UI element used to display status, labels, or categories. It is built using `class-variance-authority` for flexible styling and `tailwind-merge` for efficient class name concatenation. ### Key Exports * **`Badge`**: The main React component for rendering a badge. * **`badgeVariants`**: A `cva` function that generates CSS class names based on provided variants and props. ### Props The `Badge` component accepts the following props: * **`variant`**: (Optional) Controls the appearance of the badge. Available options are: * `default`: Primary colored badge. * `secondary`: Secondary colored badge. * `destructive`: Destructive action colored badge. * `outline`: An outline badge with text color. * **`className`**: (Optional) Allows for custom CSS classes to be applied to the badge. * **`...props`**: Any other standard HTML `div` attributes can be passed down. ### Usage Example ```jsx import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge'; function MyComponent() { return (
Default Badge Secondary Badge Destructive Badge Outline Badge Custom Badge
); } ```
